name_cn:
Premium
🔥🔥🔥
Small Blue Monogram Praphy Shoulder Bag, featuring a crescent shape, with the classic large metal Logo FEND1] decorated at the bottom of the bag. The bag's contour fits the body's lines perfectly, giving a full sense of fashion when worn under the arm, simply a walking trendsetter!
Small Size 20×7.5×13cm
